name: Boys and Girls Club of the Colorado River
description: Come play pickleball at Boys and Girls Club of the Colorado River in Bullhead City, AZ! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Centennial Park

These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts can be reserved. The courts are free.
